candidates.title: Tri-Fold Menu Design for Traditional Pub
candidates.tools: InDesign · Illustrator — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: PROJECT: THE GEORGE INN OUNDLE – MENU DESIGN I need a professional tri-fold (3-panel foldable) menu design created in Canva for The George Inn, Oundle. The design should be fully editable in Canva so that we can easily update prices, add or remove products, and print new copies in the future without requiring further design work. DELIVERABLES 1. Main Drinks Menu (Tri-Fold) Draught Beer & Cider Bottled Beer & Cider Gin Vodka Rum Whisky & Bourbon Brandy & Cognac Tequila, Shots & Liqueurs Soft Drinks Mixers Juices 2. Wine List (Tri-Fold) White Wines Rosé Wines Red Wines Premium Wines Sparkling Wines Prosecco Port Wine by the Glass & Bottle Pricing 3. Cocktail Menu (Tri-Fold) Signature Cocktails Classic Cocktails Spritz Selection Mocktails Premium Serves Seasonal Specials DESIGN REQUIREMENTS Use The George Inn Oundle logo provided. Traditional premium British pub/gastro pub style. Elegant an

candidates.title: Fast-Food Menu Illustrator Design
candidates.tools: Illustrator · InDesign — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: I need a sharp, modern menu designed in Adobe Illustrator for a fast-food restaurant. We already have a full brand style guide, so the colors, fonts, and overall layout imagery from that guide must come through clearly in the final piece. Scope • Design a clean, eye-catching menu that organizes items, descriptions, and prices in a way that is easy to read at a glance. • Reflect our fast-food vibe while staying 100 % on brand—use the specified color palette, typography, and visual hierarchy from our guide. • Prepare both an editable .AI file for future updates and a press-ready PDF for immediate printing. What I’m looking for You’re comfortable in Adobe Illustrator and have an eye for typography, spacing, and hierarchy. Past work creating restaurant menus, brochures, or other print collateral will stand out. Accuracy and attention to detail matter; I don’t want to hunt for missing fonts o

candidates.title: Industrial Showroom Interior Redesign
candidates.tools: InDesign · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork and multi-page layout
candidates.brief: Kami akan mengubah lantai dasar kantor (10 × 9 m) menjadi showroom utama yang sekaligus berfungsi sebagai ruang meeting bergaya semi-café. Fokus ruang ini adalah menampilkan produk automasi kami secara mencolok sambil tetap menyediakan meja dan kursi nyaman untuk diskusi dan kerja santai. Gaya yang kami inginkan bersifat industrial modern: dominasi motif kayu natural berpadu dengan dinding putih dan aksen metalik-silver. Logo perusahaan harus menjadi titik fokus pertama ketika tamu melangkah masuk; pencahayaan dan komposisi elemen interior perlu menuntun mata langsung ke logo tersebut. Kami juga ingin layar interaktif terpasang di area display untuk demonstrasi sistem—pastikan penempatan, sudut pandang, serta integrasi kabelnya rapi dan mudah dioperasikan. Deliverable yang saya butuhkan: • Konsep desain lengkap (mood board, palet material, referensi furnitur) • Denah layout 2D dengan zon

candidates.title: Sleek Digital Menu Design
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator · InDesign — for scalable vector artwork and multi-page layout
candidates.brief: I need a professionally designed menu that will live entirely online, so everything you create must be optimised for digital use—think sharp on retina displays, quick to load, and easy to read on phones, tablets, and desktop screens alike. I will supply the dish names, descriptions, prices, and any brand assets (logo, colour palette, preferred fonts). What I want from you is a cohesive layout that makes the food shine, guides the reader’s eye naturally, and fits neatly within the overall brand look. Because the project is digital-only, please keep print-specific considerations out unless you feel a dual-purpose file would add value; if you can include that as a bonus, let me know. Your design tools are up to you—Adobe InDesign, Illustrator, Figma, Canva Pro, or any other professional platform you prefer—so long as the final files meet the requirements below. candidates.title: Luxury Gifting Catalogue & Posts
candidates.tools: InDesign — for print-ready CMYK output and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: I’m refreshing the visual identity of Giftology Studio, Jaipur, and need a creative partner who can translate our premium, luxurious vibe into tangible assets. The first milestone is a coffee-table-worthy catalogue that spotlights our gifting hampers in their best light—think clean layouts, clear hierarchy, and plenty of room for the products to shine. Alongside that, I want a bank of Instagram posts that carry the same sumptuous look and feel, so the transition from print to digital is seamless. Your scope will touch every step of the process—from mood-boarding and product styling all the way to coordinating or art-directing the photoshoots if you’re local or have remote solutions. Strong storytelling is key; each spread, post, and hero shot should whisper “exclusivity” while still feeling warm and inviting. candidates.title: Corporate Business Card Design
candidates.tools: Illustrator · InDesign — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: I’m ready to refresh my business cards and need a clean, professional layout that aligns with our corporate branding. The card must feature: • My name and job title • Our company logo and physical address • Complete contact details (email and phone) • A scannable QR code linking to our website Please work strictly within our established company colour palette so the final piece sits perfectly alongside existing collateral. I’ll supply the logo files, colour references and the URL for the QR once we start. Final deliverables should include print-ready PDFs with bleed, plus the original, editable source file (Illustrator or InDesign preferred). Once approved, I’d also like a high-resolution PNG for quick digital sharing. If you have previous corporate card samples, feel free to share a couple so I can see your style. Let’s create something sharp that represents the brand with confidence.
